response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation contexts, has no demonstrable experience with IEC 62443, MQTT, REST APIs in embedded systems, or multi-threaded high-performance C++ applications — core requirements for the role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief early-career C++ exposure unrelated to the target domain.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to work across embedded, desktop, and cloud environments
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ work in industrial automation or high-performance systems
Lacks experience with IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or industrial cybersecurity implementation
